name: FF Closed Won/Lost ICP Intelligence Report v2

nodes.name: Read Clay Export
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE with your actual Google Sheet ID.
2. Paste the full Clay CSV export into a tab named 'Clay Export'.

All 74 columns are used directly — no second sheet needed.

Key columns consumed by this workflow:
  Deal Outcome, Amount, Service Line, Deal owner,
  Close Date, Create Date, All Company Name,
  Revenue_Tier, Company_Size_Tier, Industry_Tier,
  Type with Fallback, Country with Fallback, State,
  Crm Platform, Has Revops Function, Marketing Automation,
  Sales Engagement, Normalized_Lost_Reason, Sales_Cycle_Days

nodes.name: AI Agent (Claude Opus)
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED: Add Anthropic API key as a credential named 'Anthropic account'.
Model: claude-opus-4-5 for best report quality.
Temperature 0.3 keeps outputs factual and consistent.

nodes.name: Gamma — Internal Report
nodes.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
Create an HTTP Header Auth credential:
  Name: Gamma API Key
  Header name: Authorization
  Header value: Bearer sk-gamma-8WLq... (your actual key)

Confirm endpoint URL with Gamma docs: https://gamma.app/docs/api

nodes.name: Gamma — External Report
nodes.notes:
Same Gamma API credential as internal.
Rep names replaced with Rep A, Rep B... in this version.

parameters.text:
=✅ *Full Funnel ICP Intelligence Report — Generated*

📊 *Dataset:* {{ $node['JS Pre-Calculate'].json.metadata.totalDeals }} deals | {{ $node['JS Pre-Calculate'].json.metadata.totalWon }} Won / {{ $node['JS Pre-Calculate'].json.metadata.totalLost }} Lost
📈 *Overall CvR:* {{ $node['JS Pre-Calculate'].json.metadata.overallCvr }}%
💰 *Avg ACV:* ${{ $node['JS Pre-Calculate'].json.metadata.overallAvgAcv.toLocaleString() }}
📄 *Pages:* {{ $node['Parse AI Response + Anonymize'].json.pageCount }}

🔒 *Internal version* (rep names visible): Gamma link from internal node above
🌐 *External/demo version* (anonymized): Gamma link from external node above

_Tag Neeraj for final review before sharing with Matt/Steve_ 👆

nodes.notes:
